prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约2000名→1867名→1900名→1592名→791名，整体呈前移趋势，尤其2025年大幅跃升至791名，较2024年前移约801名 ，反映出该校在海南省的报考热度显著上升；该校在海南省综合类招生计划：2021年10人、2022年15人、2023年24人、2024年27人、2025年10人、2026年19人。2026年计划较2025年增加9人（+90%），属于大幅扩招，将显著缓解竞争压力，推动最低位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学为985、211、双一流高校，2026 年软科中国大学主榜排名第12位（较2025年第14位上升2位），创历史新高，威海校区与本部共享办学资源与声誉，学校层次对考生有持续吸引力；2026年高考 周期内哈工大声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情冲击；历史投档异常数据中未见哈工大（威海）明显断档记录，报考心理稳定；哈工大本部第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科达17个，包括力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A等，威海校区开设的工科试验 班（AI加先进技术领军班）、软件工程等专业与本部优势学科高度关联，学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年海南省高考考生总数约78000人，较2025年67408人增加约 10592人（+15.7%），竞争加剧；工科、计算机、人工智能等专业社会热度持续偏高，哈工大相关专业吸引力强；哈尔滨工业大 学（威海）位于山东省威海市，非本省高校，但作为C9联盟成员哈工大的校区，跨省吸引力强；海南省考生规模较小，招生计划波动对位次影响显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025 年基准位次791名、2026年大幅扩招（+90%至19人）、考生总数增加（+15.7%）、学校排名上升至第12位等多重因素，扩招对位次后移的拉动作用远超考生增加带来的竞争压力， 预计2026年最低位次将较2025年明显后移。预测最低位次约1223名，区间1076–1370名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班）（2025年招生专业，含计算机科学与技术、人工智能等）
- 软件工程（卓越优才计划）（2026年招生）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（2026年招生，含计算机科学与技术、人工智能、网络空间安全等）
- 工科试验班（未来智造卓越优才计划）（2026年招生，含机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化等）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 船舶与海洋工程（卓越优才计划）（2024年招生专业）
- 海洋信息工程（2024年招生专业）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年哈工大（威海）在海南省大幅扩招，预测位次区间1076–1370名。位次在区间下限（1076名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（AI领军班、软件工程）；位次在区间中 段的考生以二档工科试验班为主力填报；位次在区间上限（1370名）附近的考生可考虑三档专业保底。各专业均享有哈工大本部学科资源，建议结合个人兴趣与职业规划选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province were approximately 2000 → 1867 → 1900 → 1592 → 791, showing an overall forward trend, especially in 2025 with a significant leap to 791, moving forward about 801 places compared to 2024, reflecting a notable increase in the popularity of this university in Hainan Province; the enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province: 10 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 27 in 2024, 10 in 2025, and 19 in 2026. The 2026 plan increases by 9 people (+90%) compared to 2025, which is a substantial expansion, significantly alleviating competition pressure and pushing the minimum ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In 2026, it ranks 12th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (up 2 places from 14th in 2025), reaching a historical high. The Weihai campus shares resources and reputation with the main campus, and the university level has a sustained attraction for candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, HIT's reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion impact; there are no obvious gaps in historical admission anomalies for HIT (Weihai), indicating stable application psychology; HIT's main campus has 17 disciplines rated A- or above in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, etc. The Weihai campus offers engineering experimental classes (AI and Advanced Technology Leading Class), software engineering, and other majors highly related to the main campus's advantageous disciplines, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Hainan Province is about 78,000, an increase of about 10,592 people (+15.7%) compared to 67,408 in 2025, intensifying competition; engineering, computer science, artificial intelligence, and other majors continue to have high social popularity, and HIT's related majors have strong appeal; Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, not a local university, but as a campus of HIT, a member of the C9 League, it has strong cross-provincial appeal; the candidate pool in Hainan Province is relatively small, and fluctuations in enrollment plans significantly affect rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 791, the significant expansion in 2026 (+90% to 19 people), the increase in total candidates (+15.7%), and the university's ranking rising to 12th, the expansion's effect on pushing the ranking backward far outweighs the competition pressure from the increased number of candidates. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly move backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1223, with a range of 1076–1370.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI and Advanced Technology Leading Class) (2025 enrollment major, including Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Software Engineering (Excellent Talent Program) (2026 enrollment)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (2026 enrollment, including Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Cyberspace Security, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Program) (2026 enrollment, including Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design and Automation, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering (Excellent Talent Program) (2024 enrollment major)
- Marine Information Engineering (2024 enrollment major)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, HIT (Weihai) significantly expands enrollment in Hainan Province, with a predicted ranking range of 1076–1370. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (1076) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (AI Leading Class, Software Engineering); candidates in the middle of the range should primarily apply for Tier 2 engineering experimental classes; candidates near the upper limit (1370) can consider Tier 3 majors as a safety option. All majors enjoy the disciplinary resources of HIT's main campus. It is recommended to choose based on personal interests and career plans.
